_comment: Machine-readable L1-L5 layer naming contract (Gate 8). deny patterns are checked first; any match = FAIL. Then a name must be non-generic. Enforces the naming rules from SAP_BUILD_MANIFEST.md §2.

deny.why: decorative characters are forbidden in final layer names (tags stripped at Bind)
token/typo tags must not remain in FINAL names (they are stripped at Bind — this check runs on the delivered frame)
generic auto-generated names are forbidden — use a semantic role name
never suffix an instance name with ' (SAP)' — preserve official kit names as-is
redundant single-child nesting (e.g. Header > Header) is forbidden

_denyExceptions._comment: The token-tag deny applies to the FINAL delivered frame. A pre-Bind frame legitimately carries [sapToken]/[typo:] tags; run this linter only on post-Bind frames, OR pass --pre-bind to skip the tag-in-name deny.
